_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to describe and implement strategies that help communities value and celebrate diversity.

_source.w: We are learning to describe and implement strategies that help communities value and celebrate diversity.
y: Actively valuing diversity creates communities where everyone can thrive.
Implementing strategies — not just talking about them — is what makes real change happen.
These skills prepare us to be leaders in creating inclusive communities.
eg: Planning an event that celebrates the cultural diversity in our school.
Implementing a strategy to include students who are often left out.
Discussing how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander cultural practices enrich our community.
Investigating how other schools or communities promote diversity and inclusion.
Creating resources that help classmates learn about different cultures and backgrounds.
Evaluating how well our school values diversity and suggesting improvements.
